overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through a rural countryside. The journey progresses from a pond-side trail near a village, past a large willow tree and wooden fences, to a scenic lakeshore with a sailboat visible on the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path alongside pond approaching village

events.description: villager in red clothing appears walking in opposite direction on the left side of path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path toward distant village houses

notable_agents.action: villager in red clothing walking toward camera then passing by on the left

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through grassy countryside with tire tracks
calm water body visible through trees on the left side
cluster of traditional wooden village buildings with thatched roofs in the distance
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path beside a pond, heading toward a distant village. The path is lined with pine trees and bushes. Around the 12-second mark, a villager in red clothing passes by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path passing large willow tree and wooden fences

agents.ego_description: continuing along path passing a large willow tree and rustic wooden fence lines

entered.detail: large spreading willow tree with drooping branches overhanging the path
rustic wooden post fence running alongside the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path continues through open countryside, passing a prominent willow tree and wooden fences. The village and pond recede into the background as the landscape opens up to grassy fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside path with wooden barriers and sailboat

events.description: path opens to reveal large lake with wooden sailing vessel coming into view

agents.ego_description: walking along the lakeshore path with sailboat visible on the water to the right

entered.detail: expansive blue lake visible to the right of the path
wooden sailing ship with tan sails floating on the lake
fallen wooden logs and barriers along the waters edge

segments.scene_description: The path curves to follow the lakeshore, revealing a large body of water with a sailboat. Wooden barriers line the water's edge as Geralt continues walking along the scenic waterfront trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path that transitions from a wooded pond-side trail into an open, scenic lakeshore. It begins with Geralt walking past pine trees and bushes beside a pond toward a distant village, just as a villager in red clothing passes by in the opposite direction. As the path continues, the village and pond recede into the background and the landscape opens up into grassy fields marked by wooden fences and a prominent willow tree. The scene then shifts as the trail curves to follow the water's edge, revealing a large lake with a sailboat on the horizon. Finally, the camera tracks Geralt along the waterfront trail, lined with wooden barriers under a wide, open sky.
